marketing-audiences-prospects.png.note: Marketing > Audiences, Prospects tab. Orients the reader on where prospects live. Agent-captured 2026-07-17 at 1680x500 CSS clip, 2x, dom-sanitize (freshenDates:false, custom replacements for two non-NANP phone formats the stock regex missed). Pre-stripped plus-tag emails (name+123@domain) before sanitize to avoid the phone regex mis-matching the +digits suffix and corrupting the email. Hid the unselected 'Staging Test Brand' pill and three test-artifact rows (Max Testing22, testing invalid fields, Testing New) via page.evaluate display:none -- no fabricated data, just seed-data blemish cleanup. No cursor -- read-only orientation state.
